text.echoprotocol.command.no_recording: No usable recording exists for %s yet.
text.echoprotocol.command.mimic_hostile: Forced %s's active Mimic into hostile mode.
text.echoprotocol.command.mimic_harmless: Forced %s's active Mimic to disappear harmlessly.
text.echoprotocol.command.skin_status: Skin status for %s: signed texture property=%s, real_player_skins=%s, skin_cache_enabled=%s.
text.echoprotocol.command.skin_clear_cac: Requested skin cache refresh for %s. Client-side Minecraft skin caches refresh safely when the next Echo renders.
advancements.echoprotocol.root.title: Echo Protocol
advancements.echoprotocol.root.descripti: The world has started remembering you.
advancements.echoprotocol.deja_vu.title: Déjà Vu
advancements.echoprotocol.that_was_me.de: See an Echo replay one of your previous routes.
advancements.echoprotocol.it_saw_me.desc: Witness an Echo stop and look directly at you.
Witness an Echo leave its recorded path.
advancements.echoprotocol.it_looked_back: Witness an Echo deliberately look at you.
advancements.echoprotocol.perfect_copy.d: Witness a Mimic Echo repeat your current movements.
advancements.echoprotocol.not_me.title: Not Me
advancements.echoprotocol.not_me.descrip: Witness a Mimic Echo act independently.
advancements.echoprotocol.do_not_look_aw: Let a Mimic Echo move closer while unobserved.
Survive a hostile Mimic Echo event.
See an Echo wearing the skin it remembers.
advancements.echoprotocol.behind_you.des: Let an Echo move closer from outside your view.
